attr.title: A Solitaire Mystery
attr.desc: A collection of 30 mysterious solitaires. The solitaires included vary from fairly standard cardgames to funky reimplementations of other games in solitaire form.
attr.inst:
Purchase the game from https://hempuli.itch.io/a-solitaire-mystery, download the windows version, and place the ASM_itch.exe into ports/asm/gamedata
Works with version 1.5.10
